title: AS/NZS 4600:2018 Purlin Design
description: Design steel purlins in accordance with AS/NZS 4600:2018.

areaCustom.description: Area, A. Units: mm2. Total Area of Purlin Section

moixCustom.description: Ix. Units: mm4. Moment of Inertia about Major Axis

moiyCustom.description: Iy. Units: mm4. Moment of Inertia about Minor Axis

zxCustom.description: Zx. Units: mm3. Elastic Section Modulus about Major Axis

zyCustom.description: Zy. Units: mm3. Elastic Section Modulus about Minor Axis

d.description: Depth (d). Units: mm. Depth of the Section

b.description: Flange (b). Units: mm. Width of the Section

l.description: Lips (l). Units: mm. Length of the Lip

t.description: Thickness (t). Units: mm. Thickness of the Section

custom.description: Custom Properties. Symbol: Custom_{box}. Toggle to Input Custom Section Properties

Fy.description: Yield Strength (Fy). Units: MPa. Yield Strength of Steel

E.description: Modulus of Elasticity (E). Units: MPa. Modulus of Elasticity of Steel

ρ.description: Density (ρ). Units: kg/m^3. Mass Density of Steel

R.description: Reduction Factor (R). Reduction factor as per AS/NZS 4600 3.3.3.4

L.description: Bay Length (L). Units: m. Distance Between Supports

s.description: Spacing (s). Units: m. Center-to-center Spacing of Purlins

θ.description: Roof Slope (θ). Roof Slope in Degrees

G.description: Superimposed Dead Load (Gsdl). Symbol: G_{sdl}. Units: kPa. Unfactored Pressure (excluding selfweight)

Q.description: Live Load (Q). Units: kPa. Unfactored Pressure

Wsi.description: Service Inward Wind Load (Ws+). Symbol: Ws_{+}. Units: kPa. Service Pressure

Wso.description: Service Outward Wind Load (Ws-). Symbol: Ws_{-}. Units: kPa. Service Pressure (Negative Value Represents Suction)

Wui.description: Ultimate Inward Wind Load (Wu+). Symbol: Wu_{+}. Units: kPa. Ultimate Pressure

Wuo.description: Ultimate Outward Wind Load (Wu-). Symbol: Wu_{-}. Units: kPa. Ultimate Pressure (Negative Value Represents Suction)

S.description: Snow Load (Su). Symbol: Su. Units: kPa. Unfactored Pressure

Ψ_l.description: Long term factor (Ψl). AS/NZS 1170 Table 4.1 (Long term factor)

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
